content: When refreshing stale doc counts (CLAUDE.md, README.md): verify each metric with the exact command listed in the spec's Verified Counts table — never trust memory. Edit only lines explicitly enumerated in 'Specific Edits'. Leave per-group MCP tool counts (core=14, registry=3, a2a=4, wiki=5, session=3, acp=9) as-is unless re-verified. MCP tool count: grep 'name: "am_' src/mcp/server.ts → 38 total (33 active + 5 DEPRECATED_ALIASES at src/mcp/server.ts:118). ADR-0031a uses 'a' suffix because it formally amends ADR-0031, preserving chronology without renumbering.

When an ADR schema-only field becomes live-enforced (e.g. ADR-0036 variant.permission_policy via DWL-T13 commit 6c1ecb9), promote it to README in the same wave. Insert as a focused subsection between adjacent topical sections separated by --- rules. Required shape: one-paragraph user-value hook, ADR cross-link in relative-path form, TOML example showing the now-live field, CLI example, numbered Resolution-order list, single sentence on precedence. Voice: declarative, no marketing fluff, fenced code with explicit lang tags. Always verify documented CLI flags exist in src/commands/<cmd>.ts before writing — drop unimplemented flags and report as follow-up rather than documenting vapor (--list-variants on am run is one such gap as of 2026-05-16: only --variant is wired in src/commands/run.ts).
